findings.issue: Path traversal risk due to unsanitized filename
findings.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename.
findings.recommended_fix: Sanitize filename to remove path separators or use a generated unique name.

findings.issue: File type not validated by content
findings.recommended_fix: Validate file MIME type using magic bytes instead of relying solely on extension.
Set a non-empty value for audit_log_retention_days to ensure logs are retained appropriately.
